title: ervum durandii
intro: Ervum durandii, also known as Dolichos lablab, is a perennial legume native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ervum durandii include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and exhibit anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, Ervum durandii is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powder, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
